topics: You have one wish. You cannot wish for more wishes. However, your wish will come with sacrifices, depending on the size. Would you wish for something? Why or why not? If so, what would you wish for?
What are some of your hobbies?
If you knew you only had 24 hours to live, what would you do?
Where would you like to visit someday? Why?
Who or what is a person or thing that will always have a special place in your heart? Why?
What was the most recent book you read? How was it?
What was the most recent movie you saw? How was it?
What is your favorite book? What makes it your favorite?
What is your favorite movie? What makes it your favorite?
How would you describe yourself? How so?
What is your favorite type of music? Why?
Who is your favorite composer? Why?
What games do you like to play in your freetime? What makes them appealing?
What genres of games do you like? Why?
